name: Orange-Date Balls
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Toasted whole wheat flake cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates, margarine, and sugar in a 3-quart casserole dish. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 4 minutes.
2. Stir in egg and salt. Cover tightly and microwave on medium-high (70% power) for 3 to 4 minutes or until slightly thickened.
3. Stir in orange peel, orange juice, vanilla, 1/2 cup nuts, and cracker crumbs. Let stand uncovered for 10 minutes or until cool.
4. Stir in cereal. Shape into 1-inch balls using buttered hands. Roll the balls in finely chopped nuts. About 5 dozen balls; 75 calories per candy.
